title:
AN ACT AMENDING SUBPARAGRAPHS (f) AND (i) SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SIX HUNDRED FORTY-SIX,
AS AMENDED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 16769 / 65 OG No. 26, 6573 (June 30, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5386, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT AMENDING SUBPARAGRAPHS (f) AND (i) SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SIX HUNDRED FORTY-SIX,

AS AMENDED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Subparagraphs (f) and (i), Section one Republic Act Numbered Twenty-six hundred forty-six. as amended, is further amended to read as follows:

â(f) Region No. 6 comprises the Provinces of Camarines Norte, Camarines Sur, Albay, Sorsogon, Catanduanes and Masbate and the City of Naga, with regional headquarters at Naga City.

â(i) Region No. 9 comprises the Provinces of Samar, Surigao del Norte, Surigao del Sur, Leyte and Leyte del Sur and the Cities of Calbayog, Tacloban and Ormoc, with regional headquarters at Tacloban City."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
